name: High Protein
variant: High Protein (32g) Instant Ramen Noodles Spicy Beef
narration: Low Fat And Lower Carb: This ramen is made by air-drying process instead of deep-frying process, which maintains the natural nutrients of the noodles and avoids excess oil and grease. Compared with traditional deep-fried instant noodles

additionalInfo.Feature: Healthy Diet & Holiday Gifts: A thoughtful gift for health-conscious friends and family, especially during the holiday season. Support their healthy diet with a tasty and versatile food option.

name: Top Noodle Soup
narration: TOP RAMEN IS ALWAYS A SIMPLE, DELICIOUS PLEASURE, as is or tossed with your favorite ingredients. PERFECT FOR A SNACK, MEAL OR SIDE DISH NO ADDED MSG QUICK AND EASY TO MAKE! Boil 2 cups of water in a saucepan. Add noodles, breaking up if desired. Cook for 3 minutes or until noodles are tender, stirring occasionally. Remove from heat. Stir in seasonings from flavor packet and eat. (To lower sodium, use less seasoning) VEGETARIAN OPTION AVAILABLE: Try Top Ramen Soy Sauce flavor

items: TOP RAMEN IS ALWAYS A SIMPLE, DELICIOUS PLEASURE, as is or tossed with your favorite ingredients
PERFECT FOR A SNACK, MEAL OR SIDE DISH

QUICK AND EASY TO MAKE! Boil 2 cups of water in a saucepan. Add noodles, breaking up if desired. Cook for 3 minutes or until noodles are tender, stirring occasionally. Remove from heat. Stir in seasonings from flavor packet and eat. (To lower sodium, use less seasoning)
VEGETARIAN OPTION AVAILABLE: Try Top Ramen Soy Sauce flavor

blocks.text: THE ORIGINAL INSTANT RAMEN NOODLE SINCE 1970 Delicious as is or tossed with your favorite ingredients, Top Ramen is always a simple pleasure. With no added MSG, the great taste you love has been stripped down to its essential noodle goodness. Even vegetarians can enjoy our Soy Sauce and Chili flavors with their favorite toppings

name: Instant Ramen Soup Cup
variant: 32g Instant Ramen Soup Cup Variety Spicy Beef
narration: Multiple Flavors To Enjoy: You can freely switch between the warm flavor of chicken, the powerful taste of spicy beef, and the richness of guinea pork tonkotsu broth to satisfy your taste buds in different moods at any time, A Full Source Of Energy: Each packet of ramen is packed with 32 grams of plant-based protein, making it especially suitable for people who need to increase their stamina or maintain a healthy diet.

additionalInfo.Feature: Multiple Flavors To Enjoy: You can freely switch between the warm flavor of chicken, the powerful taste of spicy beef, and the richness of guinea pork tonkotsu broth to satisfy your taste buds in different moods at any time, A Full Source Of Energy: Each packet of ramen is packed with 32 grams of plant-based protein, making it especially suitable for people who need to increase their stamina or maintain a healthy diet. Whether you're a fitness enthusiast or a worker in need of high energy, this ramen is ideal for you, Low Fat And Lower Carb: This ramen is made by air-drying process instead of deep-frying process, which maintains the natural nutrients of the noodles and avoids excess oil and grease. Compared with traditional deep-fried instant noodles, the fat content is significantly lower and has fewer calories, which satisfies your taste buds without worrying about the burden, Instant And Convenient: You can enjoy a bowl of hot ramen in just 5 minutes. If you prefer a softer ramen, we recommend cooking it for a few more minutes. And you can pair it with your favorite ingredients. It is the ideal companion to quench your cravings in your busy daily routine, portable and easy to cook at home or in the office. Please try different seasonings and cooking methods to find your favorite, Premium Quality Ingredients: Plant-based protein with rich, savory broth and high-quality noodles to deliver an authentic and satisfying ramen experience.
